videos.title: What a Former Paramedic Actually Carries on Every Off-Road Trip
videos.description:
You have a recovery kit. You have a lift. You have lockers. You have a Starlink. You have spent serious money making sure your rig is ready for anything the trail throws at it. But are YOU ready?

#TrailSafety #Overlanding #FirstAid 

In this special guest episode, Christian invites Gretchen to share her experience on trail safety in a conversation the off road community has been avoiding and honestly should have had a long time ago. 

Gretchen is a former paramedic. She also owns a Jeep Gladiat

videos.title: Quick - Power Automate Flow Error Notifications
videos.description: Flow errors happen. They just do. The problem is when one fails quietly and you have no idea until someone tells you something is broken. In this video I show you what my students and I call poor man's error handling. It does not really handle the error, it notifies you the moment a flow fails so you can go fix it. I show you how to add it to any flow in about 60 seconds, then I slow down and explain exactly how it works, and finally I walk through how I use it in real production flows including

videos.title: The Way We Use AI is Changing
videos.description:
Proposals for government stakes or donated equity in major AI labs raise questions about public benefit, nationalization, and political control. Large cloud compute contracts and chip supply deals are reshaping AI infrastructure economics. A ChatGPT overhaul and the rise of agent loops signal a shift toward enterprise-focused, agent-driven workflows, widening the gap between power users and casual users.

The AI Daily Brief helps you understand the most important news and discussions in AI.
